prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 53.6 kg; Height 166.7 cm; BMI 19.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.2%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 237mg/dL; 9 months ago 269mg/dL; 6 months ago 252mg/dL; 3 months ago 203mg/dL; current 175mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.7kg; 9 months ago 52.2kg; 6 months ago 52.3kg; 3 months ago 51.7kg; current 53.6kg), Height (12 months ago 166.7cm; 9 months ago 166.7cm; 6 months ago 166.7cm; 3 months ago 166.7cm; current 166.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 44U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 42U/L), AST (12 months ago 40U/L; 9 months ago 39U/L; 6 months ago 31U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 38U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; current 33mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 80mg/g; 9 months ago 86mg/g; 6 months ago 135mg/g; 3 months ago 137mg/g; current 134mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 135mg/dL; 9 months ago 120mg/dL; 6 months ago 140mg/dL; 3 months ago 119mg/dL; current 129mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 10.9g/dL; current 10.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.81 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
